backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point placeholder with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented dashboard features (nav bar, sidebar, KPI cards, incidents table, risk heatmap, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick-reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the TourBuddy app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with five routes (Overview, Incidents, Geo-fence Alerts, Risk Heatmap, Volunteers) all wrapped inside DashboardLayout.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Left sidebar component rendering five navigation links with active-state amber highlighting, a system-online status indicator, and version info in the footer.
Top-level layout wrapper that composes AppSidebar, TopNavigation, a scrollable main content area, and Footer using shadcn's SidebarProvider.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying the current year, TourBuddy branding, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/GeoFenceAlerts.t: Interactive geo-fence alerts list component that supports client-side acknowledgment/dismissal of alerts, with severity-based styling and an empty-state 'All Clear' view.
frontend/src/components/IncidentsTable.t: Renders a scrollable table of security incidents with color-coded severity and status badges, and an optional action column with a view button. Accepts a list of incidents and a compact mode flag as props.
frontend/src/components/KPICard.tsx: Displays a single KPI metric card with an icon, value, label, optional trend indicator, and accent color theming. Supports four accent color variants mapped to Tailwind utility classes.
frontend/src/components/RiskHeatmap.tsx: Renders an SVG-based risk heatmap of named city zones color-coded by risk level (safe/caution/danger) with hover tooltips showing incident and visitor counts. Includes a legend and grid overlay.
frontend/src/components/TopNavigation.ts: Sticky top navigation bar showing the TourBuddy logo, a dynamic global alert status badge based on active incident count, a notification bell, and a user profile dropdown menu.
frontend/src/components/VolunteerTable.t: Displays a filterable table of volunteers with status tabs (All/Active/Off Duty/On Break), avatar initials with status dot indicators, and columns for badge ID, assigned area, and last check-in time.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, switching between anonymous and authenticated actors based on the current Internet Identity. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and login status states. Also exports an InternetIdentityProvider component to wrap the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserving space for future backend query integration; currently exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a dark navy command-center theme with custom CSS variables for colors, severity levels, and scrollbar utilities.
frontend/src/lib/mockData.ts: Provides static mock data arrays for incidents, geo-fence alerts, and volunteers used throughout the dashboard in place of a live backend.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and an InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/GeoFenceAlertsPage.ts: Full-page view for geo-fence alerts showing summary cards for critical/warning/total counts and a dismissible alerts panel powered by mock data.
frontend/src/pages/IncidentsPage.tsx: Incident management page with severity and status filter dropdowns, summary stat cards, and a filtered incidents table built from mock data.
frontend/src/pages/Overview.tsx: Command overview dashboard page displaying KPI cards for active incidents, geo-fence alerts, volunteers, and monitored areas alongside a recent incidents table and geo-fence alerts panel.
frontend/src/pages/RiskHeatmapPage.tsx: Risk heatmap page that renders a visual zone risk map component and a zone summary grid showing incident counts, visitor numbers, and color-coded risk levels for eight tourist zones.
frontend/src/pages/VolunteerManagement.t: React page for the Volunteer Management section that displays stat cards (total, on duty, on break, off duty counts) and a filterable volunteer roster table using mock data.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom navy and amber color palettes, typography/container-query/animate plugins, custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), border radii, and box shadows for the TourBuddy dashboard theme.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for TourBuddy describing the overall architecture (ICP/Motoko backend, React frontend, Internet Identity auth), existing implemented features, known issues, and image requirements.
